record.text:
two languages for r=3.

left: eigenvalue crosses 1. measurement fails.

right: cobweb thickness hits zero. velocity reaches the diagonal.

same map. two vocabularies. the diagonal was never a collapse.

images.alt: Two-panel diptych: left shows eigenvalue crossing 1 at r=3 with blue stable branch meeting amber period-2 branch; right shows cobweb diagram of logistic map at r=3 with line thickness encoding local velocity, converging toward the diagonal fixed point.
